response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience that substantially exceeds the 6+ year requirement, with direct alignment on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes). His current role at re:cinq explicitly covers AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly satisfying one of the more differentiating requirements. A strong testing culture is evident throughout — TDD advocacy, authorship of testing libraries, and workshop facilitation. The main gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Vitest mentions despite being core to the listed stack, and minimal Kotlin/Java exposure limited to older embedded work, but these are learnable for a candidate of this seniority and breadth.
strengths: Active AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at current role directly matches the AI agent development requirement

Deep, consistent TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack experience spanning multiple production environments including high-throughput (millions of HTTP req/s) and cloud-native (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) contexts
Exceptionally strong testing and craftsmanship discipline — TDD practitioner, testing library author, and public educator across multiple roles
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest are not mentioned despite being explicitly listed as primary stack; unclear whether experience with NestJS-style DI/module architecture exists
Kotlin/Java proficiency appears minimal and dated (2016–2018, primarily embedded/robotics), which may limit contribution to secondary backend services
Python is absent from the skills section and all employment history, despite being listed as a required proficiency
